settings.label: Repos (comma-separated)
settings.help: owner/name (GitHub) or org/project/repo (Azure DevOps). Empty = infer from the projects your agents work in.

settings.label: GitHub token (PAT)
settings.help: Fine-grained PAT with repo read access. Empty = use the gh CLI's auth.

settings.label: Azure DevOps token (PAT)
settings.help: ADO PAT with Code (read) + Build (read) scopes. Required for Azure DevOps repos.

settings.label: Notify on pipeline verdicts
settings.help: OS notification when a watched pipeline concludes.

settings.label: Notify on pipeline starts
settings.help: OS notification when a watched pipeline is triggered.

settings.label: Notify on PR activity
settings.help: OS notification on PR opened / approved / changes requested / merged.
